name: Path Traversal: '....' (Multiple Dot)
description: The product does not properly neutralize '....' (four or more dots) sequences in user-supplied pathnames, which on some operating systems can resolve to parent directory traversal and allow access outside restricted directories.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides path data containing multiple-dot sequences ('....') that flows to STORAGE[file_access] without a CONTROL node that canonicalizes the path and validates directory containment after resolving OS-specific multi-dot behaviors
